info.name: HireSettle API
info.description: HireSettle API Collection for milestone-based recruiter fee escrow on Stellar

request.description: Check API and database health status
Get a challenge nonce to sign for authentication
Register a new user with email/password authentication
Log in with email and password
Refresh access token using a valid refresh token
Log out by invalidating the refresh token
Update authenticated user's profile information

body.raw:
{
  "engagementId": "ENG-2026-001",
  "companyAddress": "GABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP",
  "recruiterAddress": "GHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPABCDEFG",
  "arbiterAddress": "GQRSTUVWXYZABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP",
  "tokenAddress": "CBIELTK6YBZJU5UP2WWQEUCYKLPU6AUNZ2BQ4WWFEIE3USCIHMXQDAMA",
  "totalAmount": "5000000000",
  "jobTitle": "Senior Software Engineer",
  "jobDescription": "Looking for a senior backend engineer with NestJS experience",
  "salaryRange": "$120k - $160k",
  "location": "Remote",
  "milestones": [
    {"name": "Candidate Placed", "paymentPercent": 30, "kind": "PLACEMENT"},
    {"name": "30 Days Retention", "paymentPercent": 35, "kind": "RETENTION"},
    {"name": "90 Days Retention", "paymentPercent": 35, "kind": "RETENTION"}
  ],
  "retentionDays": [30, 90]
}

request.description: List engagements with optional filters and pagination
Get a single engagement with full details including milestones and events
Force sync an engagement's status from the Stellar chain
List all milestones for a specific engagement
Get a single milestone by index
Get retention countdown timer details for a LOCKED milestone
List on-chain Stellar events with optional filters
Get notifications for the authenticated user
Mark a single notification as read
Mark all notifications as read
Get a user's public profile by Stellar address
Get authenticated user's notification preferences
Update authenticated user's notification preferences
List users (ADMIN role only)
Deactivate a user (ADMIN role only)
Reactivate a deactivated user (ADMIN role only)
